'''Simon Beecroft''' is the author of ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]'' as well as an editor at [[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]].

{{Author-stub}}

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]'' (2003)
*''[[Ready, Set, Podrace!]]'' (2007)
*''[[Podracers Go!]]'' (2007)
*''[[A Queen's Diary]]'' (2007)
*''[[R2-D2 and Friends]]'' (2007)
*''[[Luke Skywalker's Amazing Story]]'' (2008)
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Watch out for Jabba the Hutt!]]'' (2008)
*''[[The Clone Wars: Anakin in Action!]]'' (2008)
*[[Star Wars: Epic Battles|''Epic Battles'']] (2008)
*''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi in Training]]'' (2009)
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]'' (2009)
*''[[Death Star Battles]]'' (2010)
*''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia: Updated and Expanded]]'' (2016)
*''[[Star Wars: Extraordinary Droids]]'' (2020)
